budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: NTSC NES provides one physical frame per gameplay tick, while one bounded packed column and its attributes is prepared outside the display-critical phase and committed within its video-write budget.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The 2584-frame exact-ROM window first aligns the camera to the bottom, then reaches X=2240, reverses, and returns after traversing the complete stage1 row, including chunk, bank, and circular nametable boundaries. A 0.99 floor rejects sustained slowdown; the two-frame visibility ceiling covers the scheduler's isolated release-and-replace transition at reversal while the missed-tick streak remains capped at one.
